# Freighter Mobile

> Non-custodial Stellar wallet for iOS and Android

## Documentation
- [Auth Flow Architecture](./docs/auth_flow_diagram.md)
- [WalletConnect RPC Methods](./docs/walletconnect-rpc-methods.md)
- [Release Process](./RELEASE.md)
- [E2E Testing Guide](./e2e/README.md)

- [Getting Started](./README.md)

- [Environment Variables](./.env.example)

- [E2E CI & Triggers](./e2e/docs/ci-and-triggers.md)
- [E2E Local Setup](./e2e/docs/local-setup-and-env.md)

## Architecture
- [AI Agent Context](./CLAUDE.md)
- [Mock dApp for Testing](./mock-dapp/README.md)

## Key Concepts
- React Native app with Zustand state management (ducks pattern)
- 434 TypeScript files, ~73,500 LOC
- Navigation: React Navigation with nested navigators
- dApp integration: WalletConnect v2 (4 RPC methods)
- Testing: Jest (unit) + Maestro (e2e, 6 test flows)
- Dual bundle IDs: dev (freighterdev) and prod (freighterwallet)
- Build: Metro, Fastlane, Gradle (Android), Xcode (iOS)
